banners.title: WHEN IT COMES TO APPAREL DECORATION, WE  KNOW HOW TO DELIVER.
HỘP CỨNG QUÀ TẶNG & LUXURY PACKAGING
banners.description: Gia công bồi carton lạnh, bế âm dương, nắp nam châm hít, ép kim phủ UV sang trọng. Sự lựa chọn hoàn hảo tôn vinh giá trị Yến sào, Đông trùng, Mỹ phẩm, Trang sức quý phái.

banners.title: THIẾT KẾ ĐỘC QUYỀN - IN MẪU MIỄN PHÍ
banners.description: Đội ngũ chuyên viên mỹ thuật sáng tạo, thiết kế Marquette 3D độc bản và hỗ trợ in mẫu thử màu sắc chất liệu hoàn toàn miễn phí trước khi tiến hành sản xuất hàng loạt.

services.name: SILK-SCREEN PRINTING
services.description: The classic take on garment decoration with special attention to what works with your fabric, graphic, and style, executed by a variety of print techniques.
services.descriptionTitle: The classic take on garment decoration with special attention to what works with your fabric, graphic, and style, executed by a variety of print techniques.
details: Suitable for a wide range of apparel, including childrenswear, sportswear, intimate wear, and other textile applications.
Flexible production volumes, supporting both small runs and large-scale orders per graphic.
Advanced screen printing with precise multi-color registration, capable of handling complex, high color-count artworks.

Multiple printing techniques, including water-based, silicone, metallic, high-density, puff, glow-in-the-dark, glitter/shimmer, foil, photochromic, photorealistic, reflective, clear gel, and other advanced special-effect applications.
High quality inks, non-toxic, phthalate-free, and selected for durability and color stability.
OEKO-TEX® Standard 100 certified inks, ensuring safety and compliance with international textile standards.*

certificates.name: Chứng chỉ nguồn gốc gỗ FSC® CoC

services.name: FLEXOGRAPHY DIGITAL
services.description: Add a professional retail finish to your garments.
services.descriptionTitle: Add a professional retail finish to your garments.
details: Suitable for clothing labels and stickers, applied across a wide range of materials and substrates.
Flexible production volumes, scalable from smaller runs to high-volume orders, depending on design and production requirements.
Layout support and technical consultation available for large-volume or repeat orders.
High-quality, non-toxic materials, selected for durability and compliance.
OEKO-TEX® Standard 100 certified, ensuring safety and suitability for textile applications.*

services.name: EMBROIDERY
services.description: A refined expression of texture and detail, combining craftsmanship with automated precision.

services.name: CUSTOM GRAPHIC ​DESIGN CONSULTATION
services.description: A dedicated in-house design team supporting your ideas from concept to production-ready artwork.
services.descriptionTitle: A dedicated in-house design team supporting your ideas from concept to production-ready artwork.
details: Custom apparel graphic development, tailored for printing and embroidery processes.
Packaging and label design, aligned with material, technique, and retail requirements.
Promotional and branding materials, developed with production feasibility in mind.

about.title: Nhà Máy In Ấn & Bao Bì In Kava
about.description:
Khởi nguồn từ khao khát nâng tầm giá trị thương hiệu Việt thông qua những bao bì tinh xảo, In Kava (Inkava.vn) đã vươn mình trở thành biểu tượng hàng đầu trong lĩnh vực sản xuất hộp cứng và bao bì cao cấp.

Chúng tôi sở hữu tổ hợp nhà xưởng tự động hóa quy mô lớn, được trang bị hệ thống máy in Offset Heidelberg Speedmaster thế hệ mới nhất của Đức kết hợp với quy chuẩn kiểm màu G7 chuẩn xác tuyệt đối. Mỗi sản phẩm xuất xưởng là kết tinh của quy trình gia công tỉ mỉ, kỹ thuật bồi dán bế hộp thủy lực chính xác từng milimet và sự tận tụy của đội ngũ kỹ sư hơn 15 năm kinh nghiệm. Với phương châm 'Kiệt tác bao bì - Nâng tầm thương hiệu', In Kava cam kết đồng hành cùng các nhãn hàng tạo nên sự bứt phá vượt trội về diện mạo.

contacts.message: Tôi muốn đặt in 10,000 hộp giấy đựng mỹ phẩm, vui lòng gửi báo giá in offset phủ UV.
Cần tư vấn thiết kế và in túi giấy Kraft cho hệ thống cửa hàng thực phẩm sạch.

aboutFactory.title: OUR FACTORY AT A GLANCE
aboutFactory.description:
Inkava factory operates within a 10,000 m² integrated facility, designed for both efficiency and flexibility.

Our production lines include fully automated screen-printing systems and high-performance multi-head embroidery machines, supported by a professional sampling and quality control department.

Every detail of our process — from color mixing to stitching precision — is monitored to meet global manufacturing standards, ensuring reliability and repeatability at scale.

aboutUs.title: OUR STORY
aboutUs.description:
INKAVA is a Vietnam-based apparel decoration company specializing in screen printing and embroidery for textile partners across Central Vietnam.

Founded in 2012, we set out to elevate screen printing and embroidery through cleaner processes, thoughtful craftsmanship, and long-term material care.

Our 10,000 m² facility operates automated screen-printing lines and high-performance embroidery systems, supporting textile partners with reliable, consistent, and detail-focused output. Every step is guided by a mindset of quality — choosing better materials, reducing waste, and investing in technology that supports smarter, more sustainable production.

At INKAVA, we believe premium decoration is defined not only by how it looks, but by how it’s made. Each print and stitch is crafted to preserve ideas, elevate design intent, and help brands communicate with clarity, integrity, and lasting value.
